CheckTitle: Cosmos DB account enforces TLS 1.2 or higher
Description: **Azure Cosmos DB** accounts are evaluated for **minimum TLS version**. TLS 1.0 and 1.1 have known vulnerabilities. Enforcing TLS 1.2 ensures all client connections use modern, secure encryption protocols.
Risk: Allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes connections to **POODLE**, **BEAST**, and other protocol downgrade attacks that can compromise data in transit confidentiality.
